---
title: "Amelia Collinson"
---

## Amelia Collinson

**Maiden name:** (King)

### Description

mother of Sophia Jane Harrison

### Biography

The friendship between the Collinsons and CMY\'s mother\'s family is described by her in Coleridge, <i>[[otherbook:40]Life]</i> 31-2;  and also in the account she wrote of the novels of Julia (Collinson) Stretton (daughter of Amelia Collinson) in <i>[[cmybook:244]Women Novelists of Queen Victoria\'s Reign]</i>.

### Letters

- Letter from Novr 6th [1868]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
